parameters.name: get_air_quality
parameters.description: Current air quality (PM2.5, PM10, NO2, O3, SO2) at the nearest station. Provide either city (auto-geocoded via Nominatim) or lat+lon. Parameters: city (optional), lat+lon (optional), radius (meters, default 25000, max 25000).

parameters.name: find_stations
parameters.description: List air quality monitoring stations near a location. Use when the user wants to compare multiple stations or find station IDs for history lookups. Parameters: city (optional), lat+lon (optional), radius (meters, default 25000), limit (default 5, max 20).

parameters.name: get_station_history
parameters.description: Daily mean values for one parameter at a specific station over the last N days. Parameters: location_id (required, from find_stations), parameter (pm25|pm10|no2|o3|so2|co, default pm25), days (default 7, max 7).

value.parameter: ={{ $fromAI('parameter', 'Pollutant parameter: pm25, pm10, no2, o3, so2, co (default pm25)', 'string') }}
